scenarios.name: Modular Routing
scenarios.details: Orchestrator correctly resolves FileIngestWorkflow and UrlIngestWorkflow based on source type.

scenarios.name: Bulk Homogeneous Ingestion
scenarios.details: Batch of multiple files processed correctly via matching filename logic.

scenarios.name: Heterogeneous Ingestion (Mixed Types)
scenarios.details: A single request with both File and URL sources is handled by their respective workflows.

scenarios.name: Error Persistence
scenarios.details: Failure in one workflow doesn't block others; detailed results returned per source.
